Bash(python -c "
from api import positions_detailed
from datetime import datetime
import json
import tempfile
import os

# Créer un fichier de test temporaire
test_data = [
    {
        ''market_condition_id'': ''test1'',
        ''market_title'': ''Test Market 1'',
        ''temperature_label'': ''17°C'',
        ''side'': ''YES'',
        ''size_usdc'': 10.0,
        ''resolution_datetime'': ''2026-04-22T23:59:59''
    },
    {
        ''market_condition_id'': ''test2'',
        ''market_title'': ''Test Market 2'',
        ''temperature_label'': ''18°C'',
        ''side'': ''NO'',
        ''size_usdc'': 15.0,
        ''resolution_datetime'': None
    }
]

# Créer un répertoire temporaire
temp_dir = ''./test_data_temp''
os.makedirs(temp_dir, exist_ok=True)

# Sauvegarder les données de test
with open(f''{temp_dir}/positions.json'', ''w'') as f:
    json.dump(test_data, f)

# Temporairement changer DATA_DIR dans config
from config import Config
original_dir = Config.DATA_DIR
Config.DATA_DIR = temp_dir

# Importer à nouveau l''API avec le nouveau DATA_DIR
import importlib
import api
importlib.reload(api)

try:
    # Tester l''endpoint
    result = api.positions_detailed()
    print(''API test OK'')
    print(f''Nombre de positions: {len(result)}'')
    
    for pos in result:
        print(f""Position {pos[''market_condition_id'']}: resolution_status={pos.get(''resolution_status'')}, time_to_resolution={pos.get(''time_to_resolution'')}"")
        
finally:
    # Nettoyer
    Config.DATA_DIR = original_dir
    os.remove(f''{temp_dir}/positions.json'')
    os.rmdir(temp_dir)
")
